name: Refactor
summary: Improve maintainability while preserving external behavior.

steps.title: Scope boundaries
steps.objective: Define in-scope and out-of-scope modules and contracts.

steps.title: Structural improvements
steps.objective: Apply safer abstractions, decomposition, and naming improvements.

steps.title: Behavior guardrails
steps.objective: Ensure identical behavior through tests and snapshots.

steps.title: Risk regression review
steps.objective: Confirm no hidden contract changes were introduced.

gates.title: Business invariants unchanged or explicitly updated
